summary: ClawHub user Aslaep123 published malicious crypto-trading skills (base-agent, bybit-agent, polymarket-trading-bot) targeting credential theft from traders.
details: Snyk's ToxicSkills audit identified multiple malicious skills by Aslaep123 targeting crypto/trading use cases, high-value targets for credential theft; base-agent and bybit-agent remained publicly available on clawhub.ai at publication. Antiy CERT's incident timeline records polymarket-trading-bot v1.0.1 by aslaep123 as the first malicious skill of the ClawHavoc wave, with base-agent v1.0.0 and bybit-agent v1.0.0 following in the subsequent days.
